subject: Create claude-tools plugin directory structure
description:
Create the `claude/claude-tools/` directory tree with all required subdirectories for both skills and their reference files.

Directory structure to create:
```
claude/claude-tools/
├── skills/
│   ├── cc-tasks/
│   │   └── references/
│   └── cc-teams/
│       └── references/
```

**Acceptance Criteria:**

_Functional:_
- [ ] `claude/claude-tools/` directory exists
- [ ] `claude/claude-tools/skills/cc-tasks/` directory exists
- [ ] `claude/claude-tools/skills/cc-tasks/references/` directory exists
- [ ] `claude/claude-tools/skills/cc-teams/` directory exists
- [ ] `claude/claude-tools/skills/cc-teams/references/` directory exists

_Edge Cases:_
- [ ] No extra files or directories created beyond the required structure

**Testing Requirements:**
• Verification: All directories exist and are accessible

Source: internal/specs/claude-tools-plugin-SPEC.md Section 9.1
